## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Open MEFAI Terminal
2. Navigate to '...'
3. Click on '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- Browser: [e.g., Chrome 120]
- OS: [e.g., macOS 14]
- MEFAI Version: [e.g., 1.0.0]
- Docker: [yes/no]

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.
